name: sigil-lang
description: Sigil - A machine-first programming language optimized for AI code generation

scripts.sigil:test:canonical-stdlib: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/repoAudit/src/main.sigil -- --check canonical-stdlib
scripts.sigil:test:docs-drift: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/repoAudit/src/main.sigil -- --check docs-drift
scripts.sigil:test:repo-audit: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- test projects/repoAudit/tests && cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/repoAudit/src/main.sigil
scripts.sigil:test:repo-compile: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/repoAudit/src/main.sigil -- --check repo-compile
scripts.sigil:test:package-publishability: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/repoAudit/src/main.sigil -- --check package-publishability
scripts.sigil:test:all: cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/testAllRunner/src/main.sigil --env local
scripts.sigil:build:website: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm sigil:build:todo:prepared && pnpm sigil:build:minesweep:prepared && pnpm sigil:build:2048:prepared && pnpm sigil:build:flashcards:prepared && cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/ssg/src/main.sigil --env site
scripts.sigil:package:homebrew:
VERSION=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import re
line=open('packaging/homebrew/SHA256SUMS').read().splitlines()[0]
match=re.search(r'sigil-(.*)-darwin-arm64\.tar\.gz', line)
print(match.group(1) if match else '')
PY
) && sigilHomebrewVersion=$VERSION sigilHomebrewRepo=inerte/sigil sigilHomebrewSha256SumsPath=packaging/homebrew/SHA256SUMS sigilHomebrewOutputPath=packaging/homebrew/Formula/sigil.rb cargo run -q -p sigil-cli --no-default-features -- run projects/homebrewPackaging/src/main.sigil --env release
